text.title: Communications Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: All comms go via one-way newsletter; no replies expected.
antipattern.fix: Add a Q&A channel per segment.
Send 1-line 'no update this cycle, next on X' instead of silence.

antipattern.symptom: Meeting actions captured without owner or due date.
antipattern.root-cause: owner OR due missing on ≥1 action
antipattern.fix: Require both fields before action enters log.
